reasoning: The order notes contain a high-priority fraud alert for this customer. Gary Cooper has a refund rate of 88% (14 refunds in 55 days) with a history of false 'item not received' claims despite tracking confirmation. While the current claim is 'This isn't what I ordered', the internal note explicitly instructs staff not to process further refunds and to escalate to Loss Prevention due to suspected fraudulent activity.
